placement: OMEN-local Hyper-V VM (Default Switch NAT); container-portable to AM4 later (S5)
notes: Reusable GPU-agnostic worker template; first instance is claudefarm1 on OMEN.
MCP is the control contract, launched on demand over SSH stdio.
host IP is the Hyper-V Default Switch lease and can change across host reboots.
run_plan / agent_status / get_progress arrive in S1.
